text:
Market today: The market mood is mixed, with big tech under scrutiny. The real driver for your tech/chip heavy book is the continued dominance of the "Magnificent Seven" and intensifying AI chip competition.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down over 43% and a leveraged decay product. SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is also down significantly at nearly 50%. Your TRIM-status positions (QQQ, SMH, QQQI) are all showing losses, highlighting the current tech pressure. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the broader market's reaction to big tech's ability to carry the market. Also, watch for any further developments in the AI chip race between AMD, Nvidia, and now Alphabet.

Bottom line: Your leveraged positions are hurting, so focus on managing risk and respecting your stops in this volatile tech environment.
plays: SOXL: This leveraged ETF is down 43.12% and decaying. Seriously consider trimming or exiting to protect capital given its nature and your margin use.
SPAL: Also a leveraged ETF, down 49.7%. Review its stop at 21.38 and consider reducing exposure due to its volatility and your margin.
AMZN: Scanner suggests a BUY at 247.54-247.29 with a stop at 245.84. This Mag 7 name is in a daily discount according to the scanner.
